steps.title: Step 8 - Click Submit Payment Process Request link
Step 10 - Fill Name field with test name
Step 12 - Fill and select UK Supplier Payment template
Step 13 - Click Supplier or Party combobox
Step 14 - Fill Supplier or Party with Dell Inc.
Step 15 - Press Enter to select Dell Inc.
Step 17 - Click Tasks link from payment request
Step 18 - Click Manage Payment Process Requests link
Step 19 - Click Name field and search for test name
Step 20 - Click Search button and verify Completed status
